derived_nfrs.title: Dashboard query response time
derived_nfrs.statement: The system shall return recruitment and milestone dashboard queries within 500 ms at the 95th percentile under normal load.

acceptance_criteria.given: the system is running in a validated test environment
acceptance_criteria.when: the documented quality-attribute condition is exercised
acceptance_criteria.then: the system satisfies the NFR statement

derived_nfrs.title: Concurrent enrolment throughput
derived_nfrs.statement: The system shall support at least 50 concurrent subject enrolments per minute without error or response-time degradation beyond 1 second.

acceptance_criteria.given: the system is running in a validated test environment
acceptance_criteria.when: the documented quality-attribute condition is exercised
acceptance_criteria.then: the system satisfies the NFR statement

derived_nfrs.title: OIDC JWT authentication
derived_nfrs.statement: The system shall authenticate every API request with a valid OIDC JWT and reject requests with missing, expired, or tampered tokens.

acceptance_criteria.given: the system is running in a validated test environment
acceptance_criteria.when: the documented quality-attribute condition is exercised
acceptance_criteria.then: the system satisfies the NFR statement

derived_nfrs.title: Role-based access control
derived_nfrs.statement: The system shall enforce role-based access control so that sponsor managers, regulatory officers, safety officers, and coordinators can only perform actions permitted by their roles.

acceptance_criteria.given: the system is running in a validated test environment
acceptance_criteria.when: the documented quality-attribute condition is exercised
acceptance_criteria.then: the system satisfies the NFR statement

derived_nfrs.title: Audit log durability
derived_nfrs.statement: The system shall durably record every protocol status change, site activation, subject enrolment, and adverse-event report to an append-only audit log.

acceptance_criteria.given: the system is running in a validated test environment
acceptance_criteria.when: the documented quality-attribute condition is exercised
acceptance_criteria.then: the system satisfies the NFR statement

derived_nfrs.title: SUSAR critical alert latency
derived_nfrs.statement: The system shall raise a critical SUSAR alert to the safety officer, PI, and sponsor manager within 60 seconds of adverse-event creation when the regulatory deadline is within 24 hours.

acceptance_criteria.given: the system is running in a validated test environment
acceptance_criteria.when: the documented quality-attribute condition is exercised
acceptance_criteria.then: the system satisfies the NFR statement

derived_nfrs.title: FHIR R4 export compatibility
derived_nfrs.statement: The system shall export study, site, subject, and adverse-event data as valid FHIR R4 resources for interoperability with external research platforms.

acceptance_criteria.given: the system is running in a validated test environment
acceptance_criteria.when: the documented quality-attribute condition is exercised
acceptance_criteria.then: the system satisfies the NFR statement

derived_nfrs.title: Configurable workflow versioning
derived_nfrs.statement: The system shall support configurable study workflow and consent versioning without requiring a code deployment for routine protocol amendments.

acceptance_criteria.given: the system is running in a validated test environment
acceptance_criteria.when: the documented quality-attribute condition is exercised
acceptance_criteria.then: the system satisfies the NFR statement
